explanation: The property states that globally, if a route-calculation message is sent from the Local Node to DM_i, then it must have been the case that the Local Node previously queried the Neighbor Set, 2 Hop Neighbor Set, Topology Information Base, and Multiple Interface Association Set components. This captures the 'only after' condition.
decision2: if bool_exp3 holds, then it must have been the case that bool_exp4 has occurred before bool_exp3 holds
decision1_substring: the route-calculation message must be sent only after querying the Neighbor Set, 2 Hop Neighbor Set, Topology Information Base, and Multiple Interface Association Set components. This property holds for every DM_i.
decision2_substring: the route-calculation message must be sent only after querying the Neighbor Set, 2 Hop Neighbor Set, Topology Information Base, and Multiple Interface Association Set components.
output_structured_natural_language: Globally, if routecalc_msg_sent_local_node_to_dmi holds, then it must have been the case that local_node_queried_neighbor_set & local_node_queried_two_hop_neighbor_set & local_node_queried_topology_information_base & local_node_queried_multiple_interface_association has occurred before routecalc_msg_sent_local_node_to_dmi holds
